merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a narrow wooden staircase into an expansive rural coastal landscape during the golden hour. It begins by climbing weathered stairs flanked by dirt embankments toward a large tree, before emerging onto a coastal overlook where the ocean becomes visible to the left. As the camera moves along a dirt path, the view shifts from the waterfront toward a vintage car parked by a wooden fence with distant mountains rising in the background. The scene then expands through a rural parking area, circling past the vintage vehicle and a white compact car near a wooden shed as utility poles begin to line the route. Finally, the camera continues along the dirt road past red flowering bushes and a small white shed, stretching toward distant buildings in a valley framed by mountains.
